bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, and the opponent’s opening offer gives me the minimum value on every issue. I am targeting maximum utility with a strong opening counteroffer, while staying within the valid domain.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still extremely early (t=0.02), so there is little need to concede much yet. The opponent has moved slightly toward my preferences on issueA, but their offers are still very low utility for me, so I will make only a small concession on my lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a very high utility because it is still the opening phase at t=0.04, so there is little reason to concede much yet. The opponent has only improved issueA from valueF to valueD while holding the other issues at valueF, so I will make a small concession on my least important issueD while holding firm on the higher-weight issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.95 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is little reason to make large concessions yet. The opponent has conceded only on issueA while keeping issueB, issueC, and issueD at valueF, but since issueD is my lowest-weight issue, I can continue conceding there while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am still targeting a high utility bid around 0.94 because it is very early in the negotiation at t=0.08, so there is little need for major concessions yet. The opponent has conceded steadily on issueA but is holding issueB-D at valueF, so I will keep my highest-weight issues strong and make a small concession only on the lowest-weight issueD while avoiding an exact repeat of my last bid.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a small concession on the lowest-weight issue. The opponent has steadily conceded on issueA up to my best value but has held issueB, issueC, and issueD at valueF, so I will continue conceding only on issueD for now while protecting the more important issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.888 because it is still early at t=0.12, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has conceded substantially on issueA and slightly on issueB, while holding issueC and issueD at valueF; I will concede further on lower-weight issueC/D while protecting the high-weight issueA and issueB.

I am still targeting a high-utility bid because it is early in the negotiation, around utility 0.856 for me. The opponent has conceded substantially on issueA but is still holding issueB/issueD low and has only lightly moved issueC, so I will keep my highest-weight issues A and B at valueA while conceding further on lower-weight issueC and already fully on issueD.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.824 because it is still early at t=0.16, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent has mostly held issueB/issueC/issueD low while experimenting with concessions on issueA and once issueB, so I will hold firm on my most important issues A and B while making further movement on issueC and already conceding issueD.

I am targeting a still-high utility around 0.79 because it is early in the negotiation and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has conceded somewhat on issueA and occasionally issueB, but their offers still keep issueC and issueD at valueF, so I will concede further on lower-weight issueC/D while holding firm on the more important issueA and issueB.

At t=0.20 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around the upper 0.8s while making concessions mainly on the lower-weight issues. The opponent has improved issueA and issueB somewhat but continues to demand poor values for issueC and issueD, so I hold firm on my most important issues A and B while offering movement on C/D without accepting their very low overall bids.

I am targeting a utility around 0.84, which is a meaningful concession from my earlier near-maximal bids while still protecting the high-weight issues. The opponent’s offers have improved for me overall, especially on issueA and issueB, so I am matching their recent movement on issueB while conceding the lowest-weight issueD fully and keeping issueA strong because it matters most to me.

I am targeting a utility around 0.81, which is a modest concession from my prior offer while still protecting the most important issue, issueA. At t=0.24 there is no need to drop to the opponent’s latest bid, but their offers show some movement toward better values for me on issueA and issueB while they consistently hold issueC and issueD low, so I concede mainly on the lower-weight issues.

At t=0.26 I am still targeting a strong utility around 0.78–0.80 rather than making a large concession, since there is substantial time left. The opponent’s valid offers have improved somewhat for me but remain inconsistent and mostly weak; I will concede further on the lower-weight issueC while holding firm on the most important issueA and keeping issueB at a moderate concession.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.74 because it is early-mid negotiation at t=0.28, so I should concede but not collapse toward the opponent’s best-known demands. The opponent has improved some offers for me, especially on issueA/issueB at times, but their latest bid is worse than their best prior bid; I will hold firm on high-weight issueA while conceding more on lower-weight issueC and issueD.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76, which is still strong for me but shows meaningful movement at t=0.30 by conceding on lower-priority issueD and some on issueB/issueC while holding firm on highest-weight issueA. The opponent’s offers have improved substantially for me over time, especially on issueA and issueB, with the latest offer reaching moderate utility, so I am responding with a non-repeated tradeoff that may be more acceptable without giving up too much.

I am targeting a utility around 0.73, still above the opponent’s latest offer to me but with meaningful concessions as we move into the early mid-game. The opponent has improved substantially from all valueF to offers including better issueA/issueB values, but they are still holding issueC/issueD relatively low for me, so I concede mainly on lower-weight issues while protecting issueA.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.69, which is a measured concession from my last bid but still slightly better than the best opponent offer to me so far. At t=0.34 there is some time pressure to move toward tradeoffs, so I hold firm on high-weight issueA while conceding more on lower-weight issueC and issueD. The opponent’s offers show some willingness to improve issueA/issueB at times, but they keep issueC/issueD mostly unfavorable to me, and there are no messages to weigh.
